metadata.title:
CAN THE council


TAKE THIS DOSE

pages.raw_text:
AS predicted in this paper
Charles S. Bihler has been handed
most of the blame for the Howard
street disaster.


Mr.. Bihler is now in New Haven,
Conn.


In the committees report the
fact that Bihler acted soley in
capacity of the Washington Water
Power company employee and agent
has no bearing on the case. This
is the one case where the principal
cannot be held by the acts of his
authorized representative.


For the reason. 1t is argued, that
the board Of public works failed to
see that the work was properly
done.


In other words it is guilty Of put.
ting its faith in the following
promise


"The Washington Water Power
company has entered into contract
with Bennett & Bihler, and the
Puget Sound Bridge & Dredging
company, to make the necessary
requirements, extensions, additions
and repairs to make said bridges
